15 Nisan Per≈üembe

T√ºrkiye‚Äônin zengin ve yakƒ±≈üƒ±klƒ± bekarƒ± Sedat Koroƒülu‚Äônun Nalan‚Äôla evleneceƒüi haberi magazin g√ºndemine bomba gibi d√º≈üer. Nalan ve ailesi, hafta sonunu ge√ßirmek i√ßin Koroƒülu‚Äôna ait l√ºks √ßiftliƒüe davet edilir. Birbirlerini ilk defa tanƒ±yacak olan bu iki aile, karanlƒ±k sƒ±rlarƒ±nƒ± birbirlerinden saklamaya √ßalƒ±≈üƒ±rken, Nalan bir anda kendisini Rafet Koroƒülu‚Äônun hazƒ±rladƒ±ƒüƒ± bir sƒ±navƒ±n i√ßinde bulur.

Nalan ve Sedat, ailelerin de katƒ±ldƒ±ƒüƒ± sade bir t√∂renle s√∂z y√ºz√ºklerini takarlar. Koroƒülu ailesini bir t√ºrl√º i√ßine sindiremeyen Feride‚Äônin gerginliƒüi, hƒ±zla girilen evlilik yolunda, iyice artar. snippet.description:
Camdaki Kƒ±z 1. B√∂l√ºm 

8 Nisan Per≈üembe

T√ºrkiye'nin en b√ºy√ºk oteller zinciri olan Koroƒülu'nun ≈üirketinde mimar olarak √ßalƒ±≈üan Nalan, yumu≈üak huylu, zeki, sƒ±cakkanlƒ± ve d√ºnyalar g√ºzeli bir gen√ß kadƒ±ndƒ±r. Ailesinin tek √ßocuƒüudur. Hayatƒ±nƒ± varlƒ±k, ilgi, alaka i√ßinde ge√ßirmi≈ü, en iyi okullardan dereceyle mezun olmu≈ü olan Nalan'ƒ±n, herkesten sakladƒ±ƒüƒ± bir sƒ±rrƒ± vardƒ±r...

Diƒüer yandan Nalan'ƒ±n √ßalƒ±≈ütƒ±ƒüƒ± ≈üirketin gen√ß veliahtƒ± Sedat, kendisinden ya≈ü√ßa b√ºy√ºk ve evli bir kadƒ±n olan, sosyetik g√ºzel Cana ile uzun yƒ±llardƒ±r yasak bir ili≈üki ya≈üamaktadƒ±r. ≈ûirketin sahibi ve Sedat'ƒ±n babasƒ± olan Rafet Koroƒülu, yƒ±llarca didinip kurduƒüu Koroƒülu imparatorluƒüunun itibarƒ±nƒ±n, ≈üƒ±marƒ±k oƒülu Sedat tarafƒ±ndan lekelenmesine izin vermeyecektir. Rafet, Sedat'ƒ± Cana'dan ayƒ±rmak i√ßin, onu zorla ba≈üka biriyle evlendirmeye karar verir.

Ve kader √ßarkƒ± d√∂ner... Sedat ile Nalan'ƒ±n yollarƒ± kesi≈üir. Hayatƒ± boyunca kendisini babasƒ±na ispatlayamamƒ±≈ü olan Sedat'ƒ±n tek √ßaresi, daha √∂nce hi√ß tanƒ±madƒ±ƒüƒ± Nalan'la evlenmektir. Peki Sedat, Nalan'ƒ±n hayallerindeki "kurtarƒ±cƒ± prens" midir? 

√áocukluklarƒ±ndan yaralƒ± olan bu ikili kavu≈üup masallardaki gibi bir a≈ük ya≈üayabilecek midir? Yoksa onlarƒ± bug√ºne kadar hi√ß hayal etmedikleri bir karanlƒ±k mƒ± beklemektedir?

G√ºlseren Budayƒ±cƒ±oƒülu‚Äônun aynƒ± isimli romanƒ±ndan uyarlanan, ger√ßek bir a≈ük hikayesinin konu alƒ±ndƒ±ƒüƒ± Camdaki Kƒ±z, ba≈üarƒ±lƒ± oyuncu kadrosuyla da g√∂z dolduruyor. Nalan karakterini Burcu Biricik‚Äôin canlandƒ±rdƒ±ƒüƒ± Camdaki Kƒ±z‚Äôda; Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu G√ºler, Feyyaz ≈ûerifoƒülu, Hamza Yazƒ±cƒ±, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur S√ºrer, Selma Erge√ß,  ≈ûerif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tuƒürul T√ºlek yer alƒ±yor. Senaryosunu Seda Altaylƒ± Turgutlu‚Äônun kaleme aldƒ±ƒüƒ±, y√∂netmenliƒüini ise Nadim G√º√ß'√ºn √ºstlendiƒüi Camdaki Kƒ±z Per≈üembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de!

------------------

Camdaki Kƒ±z Trailer is streaming! Adapted from Gulseren Budayicioglu‚Äôs novel of the same name, Camdaki Kƒ±z is based on a true love story. Kanal D‚Äôs new drama has a phenomenal cast. Burcu Biricik is going to portray the character Nalan, and the other successful actors and actresses of the series are Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu Guler, Feyyaz Serifoglu, Hamza Yazici, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur Surer, Selma Ergec, Serif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tugrul Tulek. Written by Seda Altayli Turgutlu, directed by Nadim Guc, Camdaki Kiz is going to premier on 8 April Thursday at 8 pm on Kanal D!

snippet.title: The Truth About my Son
snippet.description:
Now that you've met my son, please consider sharing and donating to impact his life and so many others like him.
Livestream link (April 30th- MARK YOUR CALENDAR NOW!)- https://youtu.be/5J3peD8LZ5o
Learn more about the charity NEXT for Autism here- https://www.nextforautism.org/current-events/color-the-spectrum/

Join us in the live stream with a few folks you mighta heard of such as:
Andy Samberg, Adam Sandler, Casey Neistat, Chris Rock, Conan o'brien, Miranda Sings, iJustine, Jack Black, Jacksepticeye, John Oliver, Jon Stewart, Karl Jacobs, Marques Brownlee, Maya Rudolph, Mark Hamill, Merrell Twins, MrBeast, Paul Rudd, Rhett & Link, Sarah Silverman, Stephen Colbert, Terry Crews, Vsauce, Zach Galifianakis, Zach King plus a few more surprises!

snippet.title: Queen arrives at chapel for Prince Philip's funeral service
snippet.description:
The Queen arrives at St George's Chapel, where she is greeted by the Dean of Windsor, the Right Reverend David Conner.

Prince Philip's coffin is followed by senior royals, including the Prince of Wales, Princess Royal, and Princes William and Harry.

snippet.description:
'Prince Harry and William Walk Together as Royal Family Departs Prince Philip's Funeral'

Prince William and his brother, Prince Harry, were seen walking together through the grounds of Windsor Castle following the funeral of their grandfather, Prince Philip, the Duke of Edinburgh, on Saturday.

snippet.title: Kate and Camilla arrive at Duke of Edinburgh's funeral
snippet.description:
The Duchess of Cambridge and the Duchess of Cornwall arrive for the funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh at Windsor Castle.

The Queen and her family gathered to say farewell to the Duke of Edinburgh, who died just over a week ago at Windsor.

Kate Middleton arrived at St George‚Äôs Chapel wearing a pearl necklace known as the Four-Row Japanese Pearl Choker.

The necklace was loaned to Kate by the Queen from the Royal Collection after it was given to Her Majesty by the Japanese Government.

Kate previously wore the statement necklace in 2017 at a dinner to commemorate the 70th wedding anniversary of Prince Philip and the Queen.

Read more here: https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/royal-family/prince-philip-funeral-kate-middleton-pearl-necklace-meaning-b1833126.html

snippet.title: BAO Disney Pixar Full Short Film Official Promos | Incredibles 2 Bonus (2018) Animation Adventure HD
snippet.description:
Follow US on Social Media!
‚ñ∫ Instagram: https://instagram.com/aniboxtraileraccess/
‚ñ∫ Twitter: https://twitter.com/AniBox_Access

Bao is a 2018 American computer-animated short film written and directed by Domee Shi and produced by Pixar Animation Studios. It was released with Incredibles 2 on June 15, 2018. The film is about an aging and lonely Chinese-Canadian mother, suffering from empty nest syndrome, who receives an unexpected second chance at motherhood when she makes a steamed bun (baozi) that comes to life. The film won the Oscar for the Best Animated Short Film at the 91st Academy Awards.

A Chinese-Canadian woman suffering from empty nest syndrome gets a second shot at motherhood when one of her handmade dumplings comes alive.

¬© 2018 The Walt Disney Company. | All Rights Reserved.

Uyanƒ±≈ü: B√ºy√ºk Sel√ßuklu 28. B√∂l√ºm √ñzet:

Ba≈üulu‚Äôyu Batƒ±nilerin ka√ßƒ±rdƒ±ƒüƒ±nƒ± anlayan Sencer, Efruz‚Äôu yakalamak i√ßin ≈ûelemzar Dar√º≈ü≈üifasƒ±‚Äòna doƒüru yola koyulmu≈ütu.
Ba≈üulu‚Äônun Sabbah‚Äôƒ±n elinde olduƒüunu √∂ƒürendiklerinde ≈ûelemzar‚Äôƒ± alamayacaklarƒ±nƒ± anlayƒ±p Sabbah‚Äôƒ±n Ba≈üulu‚Äôyu serbest bƒ±rakmak i√ßin istediƒüi Nizar‚Äôƒ±n Hilati‚Äôni getirmeyi kabul etmek zorunda kalmƒ±≈ülar ve Melik≈üah‚Äôƒ±n huzuruna √ßƒ±kƒ±p bir bahaneyle Nizar‚Äôƒ±n Hilati‚Äôni istemi≈ülerdi.
Melik≈üah, kƒ±sa bir s√ºre sonra Sencerlerin gizli y√ºr√ºtt√ºkleri bu harek√¢tƒ± √∂ƒürenmi≈ü ve Nizar‚Äôƒ±n Hilati‚Äôni vererek; Sencerlerden gizli olarak Sabbah‚Äôa bir tuzak kurmu≈ü ve sƒ±rrƒ±n a≈üik√¢r olma vetiresini bu ≈üekilde ba≈ülatmƒ±≈ütƒ±.
Melik≈üah‚Äôƒ±n kurduƒüu tuzaƒüƒ±n neticesinde Sabbah hem hilatten hem de Ba≈üulu‚Äôdan olmu≈ütu. √á√ºnk√º Melik≈üah, Ba≈üulu‚Äôyu ≈ûelemzar‚Äôdan ka√ßƒ±rtmayƒ± ba≈üarmƒ±≈ütƒ±. Sencer, Nizam√ºlm√ºlk, Tapar ve Melik≈üah saraya d√∂nm√º≈ülerdi.
Ba≈üulu, Melik≈üah‚Äôƒ±n kar≈üƒ±sƒ±na gelmi≈üti. Ba≈üulu mecbur kalƒ±p y√ºz√ºndeki pe√ßeyi indirince uzun yƒ±llar sonra ilk kez Ba≈üulu ve Melik≈üah, birbirlerinin y√ºz√ºn√º g√∂rm√º≈üler ve sƒ±r a√ßƒ±lmƒ±≈ütƒ±! Yƒ±llar √∂nce bu sƒ±rrƒ± tertipleyen ve Melik≈üah‚Äôƒ±n tahta √ßƒ±kmasƒ±nƒ± saƒülayan Nizam√ºlm√ºlk, sultana yalan s√∂ylediƒüi i√ßin nasƒ±l bir h√ºk√ºmle kar≈üƒ±la≈üacaktƒ±r?
Melik≈üah, yanƒ±na kadar y√ºkselip yine de kendisinden saklanan Sencer‚Äôi ve Melik≈üah‚Äôƒ±n kendisini √∂ld√º bilmesine tahamm√ºl edip saklanmayƒ± s√ºrd√ºren Ba≈üulu‚Äôyu affedecek midir?
√ñte yandan sƒ±rrƒ±n a√ßƒ±lmasƒ± √ßok hƒ±zlƒ± bir ≈üekilde t√ºm Sel√ßuklu hanedanƒ±na yayƒ±lacaktƒ±r. Sel√ßuklu Hanedanƒ± √ºyeleri Ba≈üulu‚Äônun ya≈üadƒ±ƒüƒ± ve Sencer‚Äôin gizli bir veliaht olarak ortaya √ßƒ±kmasƒ±nƒ± nasƒ±l kar≈üƒ±layacaktƒ±r?
Sƒ±rrƒ± Melik≈üah‚Äôtan daha √∂nce √∂ƒürenen ve sƒ±rrƒ±n a√ßƒ±lmamasƒ± i√ßin Ba≈üulu‚Äônun kurtarƒ±lmasƒ±na mani olmak isteyen ve ba≈üarƒ±lƒ± olamayan Terken‚Äôin Ba≈üulu‚Äôya kar≈üƒ± d√º≈ümanca tavrƒ± eyleme d√∂n√º≈üecek midir?

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.title: Do we Need Nuclear Energy to Stop Climate Change?
snippet.description:
The first 1000 people to use this link will get a free trial of Skillshare: 
https://skl.sh/kurzgesagtinanutshell05211

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sourcesclimatenuclear/

Do we need nuclear energy to stop climate change? More and more voices from science, environmental activists and the press have been saying so in recent years ‚Äì but this comes as a shock to those who are fighting against nuclear energy and the problems that come with it. So who is right? Well - it is complicated.

snippet.title: DMX Dead at 50
snippet.description:
DMX has died. The rapper turned 50 in December. His death follows a heart attack he suffered, which was triggered by a drug overdose. Amid DMX‚Äôs hospitalization, a rep for his family told ET that he was in a medical state from which they do not think he will recover. On Monday, a vigil was held by the Ruff Ryders to the Rescue Foundation outside of DMX‚Äôs hospital. The ‚ÄòParty Up‚Äô performer was nominated for three GRAMMY awards, and he won Favorite Rap/Hip-Hop Artist at the American Music Awards in 2000.

Exclusives from #ETonline :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQwITQ__CeH2Y_7g2xeiNDa0vQsROQQgv

snippet.title: Lamborghini Urus v BMW X6M - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!

Check out Yiannimize - http://youtube.com/yiannimize

It‚Äôs Saturday morning, so you know what time it is‚Ä¶ Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

We‚Äôve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing who‚Äôs in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think it‚Äôll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the Lambo‚Äôs bonnet, you‚Äôll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But that‚Äôs not all‚Ä¶ The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? There‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!
